creator: paulo@lapa.isr.uc.pt
text:
On Mon, 23 Jun 1997, Satoshi Asami wrote:

>  * > The problem is simple to solve. It was due to changes in dirent.h.
>  * > Just copy the three patch files below to the patches dir under names 
>  * > patch-ar, patch-as and patch-at.
>  * > Don't forget to do a "make clean" before starting the compilation in order 
>  * > to apply all the patches.
>  * > 
>  * > Paulo
> 
> I seem to have missed the mail including these patches, can you resend 
> it?  (As an "all" reply to this mail.)
> 
> Satoshi
> 

Here they go again!

Paulo

*** patch-ar
*** ./routines/metanet/loadg.c.old	Sun Jun 22 16:54:55 1997
--- ./routines/metanet/loadg.c	Sun Jun 22 16:55:26 1997
***************
*** 1,5 ****
--- 1,8 ----
  #include <stdio.h>
  #ifndef __MSC__
+ #ifdef __FreeBSD__
+ #include <sys/types.h>
+ #endif
  #include <dirent.h>
  #endif
  #include <string.h>

*** patch-as
*** ./routines/metanet/saveg.c.old	Sun Jun 22 16:56:33 1997
--- ./routines/metanet/saveg.c	Sun Jun 22 16:56:53 1997
***************
*** 1,5 ****
--- 1,8 ----
  #include <stdio.h>
  #ifndef __MSC__
+ #ifdef __FreeBSD__
+ #include <sys/types.h>
+ #endif
  #include <dirent.h>
  #endif
  #include <string.h>


*** patch-at
*** ./routines/metanet/files.c.old	Sun Jun 22 16:57:23 1997
--- ./routines/metanet/files.c	Sun Jun 22 16:58:16 1997
***************
*** 1,5 ****
--- 1,8 ----
  #include <stdio.h>
  #ifndef __MSC__
+ #ifdef __FreeBSD__
+ #include <sys/types.h>
+ #endif
  #include <dirent.h>
  #endif
  #include <string.h>
